## 2. Backup Strategy

### 2.1 Azure SQL Database

| Setting             | Configuration |
| ------------------- | ------------- |
| Backup Type         | {config}      |
| Retention (PITR)    | {config}      |
| Long-Term Retention | {config}      |
| Geo-Redundancy      | {config}      |

**Point-in-Time Restore Command:**

```bash
az sql db restore \
  --resource-group {rg} \
  --server {server} \
  --name {db} \
  --dest-name {db}-restored \
  --time "{timestamp}"
```

### 2.2 Azure Key Vault

| Setting          | Configuration |
| ---------------- | ------------- |
| Soft Delete      | {config}      |
| Purge Protection | {config}      |
